events.name: a notice seemed to imply that he had been one of an embassy to England, apparently as "valet" or squire of Sir Robert Erskine
He and Sir Robert Erskine, with others, opposed the Earl of Douglas in his claim to the crown and persuaded him to agree to the coronation of King Robert II.
He swore to maintain the settlement made of the crown on the Stewart family.
He had a grant of the thanage of Kintore in the beginning of the reign of King Robert III.
His merchants and retainers were accused of plundering a wrecked vessel, laden with "Skoone" herrings (probably from Holland), and the owners were allowed to plunder a Flemish vessel in turn.
He had a safe-conduct to England.
He was one of the commissioners named in the treaty with England and France.
He complained in Parliament of attacks and murder done on two of his vassals, a complaint that the Earl of Buchnan was directed to inquire into, and to do justice.
He was present when his son undertook to defend the Bishop's territories.
He received a safe-conduct to fight the Earl of Nottingham.
He and his brother-in-law, Alexander, Earl of Buchan, were specially forbidden to deal in any way with the bishop's castle of Spynie.
He and his brother-in-law%2C Alexander%2C Earl of Buchan%2C were specially forbidden to deal in any way with the bishop's castle of Spynie.
He was again in England after receiving a safe-conduct to go there.
He was again in England after receiving a safe-conduct to go there.

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Dunbar 1st Earl of Moray於1340年出生在英國蘇格蘭莫雷時，他的母親Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March41歲，父親Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood30歲。他於1370年7月11日與Marjorie Stewart Countess of Moray在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1388年登記服兵役。他於1372年被列為earl of moray。他去世於1391年2月15日在英國英格蘭越可爾約克享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Dunbar 1st Earl of Moray于1340年出生在英国苏格兰莫雷时，他的母亲Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March41岁，父亲Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood30岁。他于1370年7月11日与Marjorie Stewart Countess of Moray在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1388年登记服兵役。他于1372年被列为earl of moray。他去世于1391年2月15日在英国英格兰越可爾約克享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dunbar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Dunbar, a place on the North Sea coast near Edinburgh, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’ + barr ‘top, summit’.

History: A family of this name were granted the lands of Dunbar by Malcolm III (1058–1093), and later acquired the earldoms of Dunbar and March. These earldoms were then withdrawn from the family by James I in 1434.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When John Dunbar 1st Earl of Moray was born in 1340, in Moray, Scotland, United Kingdom, his mother, Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March, was 41 and his father, Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood, was 30. He married Marjorie Stewart Countess of Moray on 11 July 1370, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1388. In 1372, at the age of 32, his occupation is listed as earl of moray. He died on 15 February 1391, in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Dunbar 1st Earl of Moray est né en 1340, à Moray, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, sa mère, Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March, avait 41 ans et son père, Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Marjorie Stewart Countess of Moray le 11 juillet 1370, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1388. En 1372, à l’âge de 32 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est earl of moray. Il est décédé le 15 février 1391, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Dunbar 1st Earl of Moray 1340 in Moray, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war seine Mutter Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March 41 und sein Vater Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood 30. Er hat am 11. Juli 1370 in Schottland, United Kingdom Marjorie Stewart Countess of Moray geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1388 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1372, als er 32 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als earl of moray aufgeführt. Er starb am 15. Februar 1391 im Alter von 51 Jahren in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Dunbar 1st Earl of Moray è nato il nel 1340 nel Moray, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo madre, Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March, aveva 41 anni e il suo padre, Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Marjorie Stewart Countess of Moray il 11 luglio 1370, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1388. Nel 1372, all'età di 32 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come earl of moray. Morì il 15 febbraio 1391, nel York, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Dunbar 1st Earl of Morayが1340年にイギリススコットランドモーアイで生まれた時，母Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and Marchは41歳，父Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwoodは30歳であった。1370年7月11日にイギリススコットランドでMarjorie Stewart Countess of Morayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1388年に兵役登録をした。1372年，32歳の時，職業はearl of morayと記録されている。彼は1391年2月15日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Dunbar 1st Earl of Moray(이)가 1340년 영국 스코틀랜드 모라이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 어머니 Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March(은)는 41세였고, 그의 아버지 Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1370년 7월 11일 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Marjorie Stewart Countess of Moray(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1388년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1372년, 32세의 나이로 그의 직업은 earl of moray이었다. 그는 1391년 2월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 요르크에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Dunbar 1st Earl of Moray nasceu em 1340, em Moray, Escócia, United Kingdom, sua mãe, Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March, tinha 41 anos e seu pai, Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Marjorie Stewart Countess of Moray em 11 de julho de 1370, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1388. Em 1372, com 32 anos, sua profissão aparece como earl of moray. Ele faleceu em 15 de fevereiro de 1391, em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Dunbar 1st Earl of Moray родился в 1340 г. в местности мореи, Шотландия, Великобритания, его матери по имени Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March было 41 год, а отцу, которого звали Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Marjorie Stewart Countess of Moray 11 июля 1370 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. В 1388 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1372 году, в возрасте 32 лет, работал по профессии earl of moray. Он умер 15 февраля 1391 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Dunbar 1st Earl of Moray nació en 1340, en Moray, Escocia, Reino Unido, su mamá, Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March, tenía 41 años y su papá, Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Marjorie Stewart Countess of Moray el 11 de julio de 1370, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1388. En 1372, a la edad de 32 años, su ocupación registrada era earl of moray. Murió el 15 de febrero de 1391, en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 51 años.
